series_metadata.series_description: System test data is pulled from Ohio Attorney General (AGO) production systems, manufactured by the AGO, or through user tests to be used as testing material for new hardware or software system features, database updates or modifications, or for reporting needs to determine if desired output is occurring. Data is chosen randomly for some instances or specifically for other instances, such as tests on a specific field where information is entered in (i.e. Social Security Numbers); data is typically obfuscated.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer useful for the system it is related to., Electronic: Delete
